label: tolerates
definition: A relation between a microbe and a chemical entity indicating that the microbe's growth is not inhibited by the chemical at the concentration tested. Positive form of the chemical-tolerance pair; the negative form is METPO:2000065 'does not tolerate'.
observations: bile acid + future heavy-metal/antibiotic resistance traits

label: does not tolerate
definition: A relation between a microbe and a chemical entity indicating that the microbe's growth is inhibited by the chemical at the concentration tested. Negative form of the chemical-tolerance pair; positive form is METPO:2000064 'tolerates'. Equivalent in meaning to 'is susceptible to' and 'is sensitive to'; the canonical label uses the 'does not X' convention so the metatraits pairing logic auto-detects it as the negative member.
observations: bile acid + future heavy-metal/antibiotic susceptibility traits

label: has growth temperature optimum value
definition: The optimum growth temperature (Celsius) reported for this organism — the temperature at which growth rate is maximal. Companion to METPO:1000304 'temperature optimum' (class form).

label: has growth pH optimum value
definition: The optimum growth pH reported for this organism — the pH at which growth rate is maximal, on the pH scale (0-14). Companion to METPO:1000331 'pH optimum' (class form).

label: has growth salinity optimum value
definition: The optimum growth salinity (% NaCl w/v) reported for this organism — the salinity at which growth rate is maximal. Companion to METPO:1000333 'NaCl optimum' (class form).

label: pH minimum tolerance
definition: An environmental quality (class form) that describes the minimum pH value supporting growth. Companion to datatype property METPO:2000705.

label: pH maximum tolerance
definition: An environmental quality (class form) that describes the maximum pH value supporting growth. Companion to datatype property METPO:2000706.

label: temperature minimum tolerance
definition: An environmental quality (class form) that describes the minimum temperature supporting growth. Companion to datatype property METPO:2000702.

label: temperature maximum tolerance
definition: An environmental quality (class form) that describes the maximum temperature supporting growth. Companion to datatype property METPO:2000703.

label: salinity minimum tolerance
definition: An environmental quality (class form) that describes the minimum salinity/NaCl concentration supporting growth. Companion to datatype property METPO:2000708.

label: salinity maximum tolerance
definition: An environmental quality (class form) that describes the maximum salinity/NaCl concentration supporting growth. Companion to datatype property METPO:2000709.
